name: Seedance High Nice - Stage 1 - Content Generation

parameters.jsCode:
const data = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: {
  job_id:             data.job_id,
  topic:              data.topic,
  category:           data.category,
  title:              data.title,
  hashtags:           data.hashtags,
  narration:          data.narration,
  opening_line:       data.opening_line,
  cta:                data.cta,
  scenes:             data.scenes,
  seedance_prompts:   data.seedance_prompts,
  negative_prompts:   data.negative_prompts,
  highlight_keywords: data.highlight_keywords,
  num_clips:          data.num_clips,
  clip_dur_sec:       data.clip_dur_sec,
  sheet_row:          data.sheet_row,
  start_time:         data.start_time,
  // reference fields from sheet
  subject:              data.subject,
  environment:          data.environment,
  energy_vein_location: data.energy_vein_location,
  est_virality:         data.est_virality,
  priority:             data.priority
}}];
